SHORT NAME: —

COMMENT: 
This variable was new in 2007. Plans that use a coinsurance percentage amount rather than a co-
payment amount will not have a value in this field; see instead the corresponding coinsurance variable 
called (PRE_ICL_MOPP_COINS_1M).
